message:
refactor(doctor): remove unused ARM64 detection code

The is_arm64 variable was left over after removing ARM64-specific
messaging (now that both CASS and UBS have proper ARM64 builds).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -889,12 +889,6 @@ check_cloud() {
 check_stack() {
     section "Dicklesworthstone stack"
 
-    # Detect ARM64 for custom guidance
-    local is_arm64=false
-    local arch=""
-    arch="$(uname -m 2>/dev/null)" || true
-    [[ "$arch" == "aarch64" || "$arch" == "arm64" ]] && is_arm64=true
-
     check_command "stack.ntm" "NTM" "ntm"
     check_command "stack.slb" "SLB" "slb"
